summary: Frontend testing completed for proactive error monitoring and POS page refactoring. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: <button> cannot contain a nested <button> - nested button elements in favorite items cause HTML nesting issue

features_tested.location: AI Control Center > Universal Error Fixer card
features_tested.details: Button with data-testid='proactive-monitoring-toggle' is visible and clickable
Green 'Proactive' badge shows when monitoring is enabled (defaults to true)
Watching button has bg-green-600 class when proactive monitoring is active
Card with data-testid='universal-fixer-card' visible with all badges (Gemini 3 Flash, Full Auto-Fix, Proactive)
POS page loads successfully with data-testid='pos-page'. Component imports from components/pos working correctly
Product grid shows items (Coke ₹40, Pizza ₹299, Burger ₹120) with availability indicators
Clicking product adds to cart, shows 'Added to cart' toast, cart displays item with quantity controls
Clear button works, shows 'Cart cleared' toast, cart shows 'Cart is empty' message
Toggle button with data-testid='toggle-quick-add-btn' works to expand/collapse favorites section

action_items: Minor: Fix nested button issue in FavoritesSection.jsx - button elements should not contain other button elements
critical_code_review_comments: Proactive monitoring useEffect at line 157-229 correctly implements 30-second polling interval
proactiveMonitoringEnabled state defaults to true as documented
POSPage.js imports from components/pos (line 19) working correctly - FavoritesSection, QuickCheckoutModal, CartSection, ProductGrid all imported
Minor HTML nesting issue in FavoritesSection - nested button elements generate console warning but don't break functionality
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing items (Coke, Pizza, Burger)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proactive error monitoring feature fully working on AI Control Center page (sidebar > Marketing & AI > AI Control Center). Universal Error Fixer card shows Proactive badge and Watching button when monitoring is active. POS page loads with product grid, cart functionality works including add/clear. Quick Add favorites section toggles correctly. Minor HTML nesting warning in FavoritesSection but doesn't affect functionality.

mocked_features.none: All features are fully implemented and functional
